testcase.name: test_commit_with_remember_alias_creates_ocr_alias

failure.message: AssertionError: Commit unexpected status 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","invoice_number"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"remember_alias":true},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body", assert 422 in (200, 201, 400, 409) + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_v25_iter8_review.py:219: in test_commit_with_remember_alias_creates_ocr_alias assert cm.status_code in (200, 201, 400, 409), \ E AssertionError: Commit unexpected status 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","invoice_number"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"remember_alias":true},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body", E assert 422 in (200, 201, 400, 409) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
